title: Rendly Internal Domain Model
description: Storage-agnostic shapes for the Rendly identity/membership domain (R-002). Every object is closed (additionalProperties:false) and every field bounded (maxLength/minLength), mirroring the R-001 contract dialect in contracts/messages.schema.json: closed schemas remove a silent smuggling channel and bounded fields remove a DoS-via-parse vector. The id formats and the on-the-wire shapes (Tenant aside) reproduce R-001's LOCKED contracts/openapi.yaml component schemas byte-for-byte so the domain and the wire agree by construction; the contract is the law and this schema conforms to it, never the reverse. This schema validates the SHAPE of each entity; relational invariants (a Membership's tenant_id equals both its user's and its channel's; external_ref present IFF source=delta_team) are enforced by the Pydantic model validators in src/rendly/ and proven by tests/domain/, exactly as Delta D-001 splits shape (schema) from relational integrity (validators). HONESTY BOUNDARIES (non-removable): (1) 'intent' reduces to a User's org-role + team-affiliation fields ONLY; there is NO Intent entity, NO preference vectors, and NO matching algorithm here — intent-based matching is the post-investment tier (R-016..R-026) and is deferred. (2) Profile (org_role + team) is the internal superset R-002 adds over R-001's wire User projection; these fields are NEVER serialized through R-001's closed User shape, so they are not a contract change to R-001. (3) Channel.source/external_ref are the RESERVED Delta-team auto-mapping seam (R-006/D-016); the domain always constructs source=manual and never auto-maps.

tenant_id.description: Ecosystem tenant join key (UUID v4). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md; server-resolved, never a raw client value. The pattern bounds it to a UUID character shape (log-injection defense), matching the wire schema.

user_id.description: Opaque user surrogate (UUID v4), never PII. LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md.

channel_id.description: Channel identifier (UUID v4), tenant-scoped. LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md.

iso_datetime.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 date-time, UTC (the wire format).

external_ref.description: RESERVED Delta-team auto-mapping pointer (opaque). null unless source=delta_team (R-006/D-016 seam). Charset-bounded (log-injection defense) — a strict subset of R-001's pattern-less ≤64 string. The source<->external_ref pairing is enforced by the Channel model validator, not the schema.

team.description: Internal team/department affiliation slug. NOT on R-001's wire User; part of the Profile superset (FORK E). Absence is null, not the empty string.

PresenceStatus.description: Matches the LOCKED 4-value wire enum (contracts/openapi.yaml User.presence + messages.schema.json presence_status).

ChannelSource.description: Provenance. manual only in normal construction; delta_team is the reserved auto-mapping seam (R-006/D-016).

OrgRole.description: Per-tenant org role (FORK B). Distinct axis from the per-channel ChannelRole; deliberately no 'owner' at org level. NOT on R-001's wire.

Tenant.description: The organization boundary / isolation scoping root. Not a wire resource in R-001; the minimal aggregate the domain scopes against.

User.description: Tenant-local user identity. Matches the LOCKED contracts/openapi.yaml User shape exactly (status_text nullable/optional). The affiliation fields live on Profile, not here (FORK A/E).

Profile.description: Internal affiliation overlay on a User (FORK E superset). org_role + team are NOT serialized through R-001's wire User.

Channel.description: Role-based secure channel. Matches the LOCKED contracts/openapi.yaml Channel shape. source/external_ref are the reserved Delta-team seam; the pairing rule is a model invariant, not encoded here.

Membership.description: User<->Channel relation, tenant- and role-scoped. Matches the LOCKED contracts/openapi.yaml Membership shape. The cross-tenant-equality invariant (tenant_id == user's == channel's) is enforced by bind_membership, not the schema.
